headline: Maxime Estève
body: ✅🔴⚪️ Exclusive Confirmed ! 🇫🇷 As revealed here on 30th June, Maxime Estève’s joining RB Leipzig from Burnley FC. mercato twitterclarets RBL Sacha Tavolieri (sachatavolieri) 🚨 EXCL – RB Leipzig have submitted a €24M bid for Maxime Estève! 🔴⚪️ The German club are in talks with Burnley FC as they look to prepare for the likely departure of Castello Lukeba from the left CB position. ✅ Personal terms won’t be an issue. mercato —
raw_text:
✅🔴⚪️ Exclusive Confirmed !
🇫🇷 As revealed here on 30th June, Maxime Estève’s joining RB Leipzig from Burnley FC. #mercato #twitterclarets #RBL




Sacha Tavolieri (@sachatavolieri)

🚨 EXCL – RB Leipzig have submitted a €24M bid for Maxime Estève!

🔴⚪️ The German club are in talks with Burnley FC as they look to prepare for the likely departure of Castello Lukeba from the left CB position.

✅ Personal terms won’t be an issue. #mercato





— https://nitter.net/sachatavolieri/status/2071987686752301409#m
